name: Bug report
about: Report broken behavior
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**

A clear description of what went wrong.

**`.tom` source that triggers it**

```tom
button:
  ...
```

**Expected CSS**

```css
button {
  ...
}
```

**Actual CSS**

```css
button {
  ...
}
```

**Tomato version**

```
$ tomato --version
```

**Node version**

```
$ node --version
```
